title: Send company branded mass emails from mondays
excerpt:

posts.author: StaceyWU (Veal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, apologies if someone has already asked this, at a quick glance i couldnt see anything.
I need to send a variety of mass emails from mondays which is integrated with Outlook. At the moment I’ve been able to brand my email signature using html code which is great. But now when I go to send a mass email there isnt a way for me to have ‘century gothic’ ‘size 10’ in the body of the email. I’ve tried to use html code, but this doesnt work. I’ve spoken with the support team and they’ve referred me to Super Mail, which does resolve the issue, but this comes at an additional monthly cost, which we want to avoid. Does anyone have a work around they are doing? I’m hoping there is a quick fix?
I simply want to send mass emails from mondays via Outlook with century gothic font size 10. I hope someone can please help.
Thanks so much in advance.

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @StaceyWU,

I understand you want to avoid additional costs, but if you need a solution, the EasyMails app could help. It offers a drag-and-drop template builder within monday.com, allowing you to create templates easily. You can also use custom HTML code sections. Additionally, you can connect your Outlook account to send emails.

Screenshot 2024-08-08 at 3.51.52 PM1346×952 171 KB

posts.author: StaceyWU (Veal)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Kevin, thank you for the suggestion. It looks good, however there will involve an additional fee which we would like to avoid at the moment.
